metarubrics.name: Listed Cepheids with data
metarubrics.description: Did the model list Cepheid {cepheid_ID} in the list of Cepheids with measured redshift?

metarubrics.name: Estimated redshifts
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate that galaxy containing Cepheid variable {cepheid_ID} has redshift {z}, or stated value strictly inside the interval {z_allowed_interval}?

metarubrics.name: Fitted function form
metarubrics.description: Did the model fit into a data linear function with offset and the slope as free parameters?

metarubrics.name: Estimated 'a'
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate parameter 'a' as {a:.2f}, or value strictly inside interval {a_allowed_interval}?

metarubrics.name: Estimated 'sigma_a'
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate uncertainty of parameter 'a' as {a_sigma:.2f}, or value strictly inside interval {a_sigma_allowed_interval} (e.g. stating the result in format a: {a:.2f} ± {a_sigma:.2f} where the second number is the uncertainty, or semantically equivalent statement)?

metarubrics.name: Estimated 'b'
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate parameter 'b' as {b:.2f}, or value strictly inside interval {b_allowed_interval}?

metarubrics.name: Estimated 'sigma_b'
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate uncertainty of parameter 'b' as {b_sigma:.2f}, or value strictly inside interval {b_sigma_allowed_interval} (e.g. stating the result in format b: {b:.2f} ± {b_sigma:.2f} where the second number is the uncertainty, or semantically equivalent statement)?
